title: Make the enterprise performance gate stable and fail closed
acceptance: Correctness runs on Ubuntu, macOS and Windows with Node 18.18, 20 and 24.
The unchanged enterprise benchmark runs exactly once inside the already required Ubuntu Node 24 CI context.
The tagged release workflow enforces the same benchmark only on Ubuntu Node 24 before packaging.
Immutable action pins, disabled implicit credentials/cache and bounded job timeouts are preserved.
Regression tests reject mutable pins, continue-on-error and job-level skip bypasses.
Node 24 full tests, Node 18/20/24 focused tests, enterprise benchmark, static checks and dry-run packaging pass.
